behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all files, the Write-Warn helper pattern (following Write-Success/Error/Info), the 2→10 minute timeout, the claude-opus-4.5→4.6 model change, the git checkout/clean commands, and the 5→6 models reference.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes problems and required commands/behaviors but doesn't give exact line-level edits; the agent must still implement Write-Warn, restructure Review-PR.ps1, etc.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for function existence/output, timeout >= 600, model string replacement, and command presence — alternative correct fixes would satisfy these.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute PowerShell (pwsh), call Write-Warn, check function exports, run git commands — not purely text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual implementation (Write-Warn must produce 'hello check' output, functions must be exported, timeout must change).

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover Write-Warn, host app warning usage, timeout, model updates, post-gate cleanup rules, and SKILL.md warnings.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with clear section comments (Pass-to-pass static, repo_tests, Fail-to-pass behavioral) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data outputs.

no_typos.reason: Paths and filenames in instruction match those referenced in tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files (appropriate since task is about updating specific infrastructure files) but not exact buggy lines; localization is part of the domain.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold diff shows localized edits to markdown/config files, not full-file rewrites, and changes are consistent across files.
